results.title: Pas confirms Bersatu ties discussed at PN emergency meeting, no decision reached
results.description: KOTA BARU: Pas has confirmed that its ties with Bersatu were among the matters discussed at an emergency Perikatan Nasional (PN) meeting today, but no decision was reached.
